lines: The more grateful I am, the more beauty I see. #<Author:0x00007f7432f86558>
Feeling gratitude and not expressing it is like wrapping a present and not giving it. #<Author:0x00007f7432f86058>
Take as a gift whatever the day brings forth. #<Author:0x00007f7432f858d8>
Gratitude unlocks the fullness of life. It turns what we have into enough, and more. #<Author:0x00007f7432f853d8>
Family is not an important thing. It's everything. #<Author:0x00007f743339fdd8>
We must take care of our families wherever we find them. #<Author:0x00007f743339f8d8>
Family and friends are hidden treasures, seek them and enjoy their riches. #<Author:0x00007f743339f3d8>
Other things may change us, but we start and end with the family.  #<Author:0x00007f743339eed8>

In every conceivable manner, the family is a link to our past, bridge to our future.
 #<Author:0x00007f743339e9d8>
Inspire and bring joy to all those you know. #<Author:0x00007f743339e398>
Our chief want is someone who will inspire us. #<Author:0x00007f743339dc18>
Promise yourself to be just as enthusiastic about the success of others as you are about your own. #<Author:0x00007f743339d498>
Those who are lifting the world upward are those who encourage more than criticize. #<Author:0x00007f743339cbd8>
The world needs dreamers and the world needs doers. But above all, the world needs dreamers who do. #<Author:0x00007f743339c458>
Don't let the fear of striking out hold you back. #<Author:0x00007f743339bb98>
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.  #<Author:0x00007f743339b698>
Obstacles are those frightful things you see when you take your eyes off the goal.  #<Author:0x00007f743339b198>
It's faith that will take you through, and determination that will drive you. #<Author:0x00007f743339ac98>
I shall either find a way, or make one. #<Author:0x00007f743339a798>
Life is an adventure in forgiveness. #<Author:0x00007f7433399ed8>
If we really want to love, we must learn how to forgive. #<Author:0x00007f7433399758>
Without forgiveness, there is no future. #<Author:0x00007f7433398fd8>
Forgive yourself for your faults and your mistakes and move on. #<Author:0x00007f7433397f98>
To forgive is to set a prisoner free and discover that the prisoner was you. #<Author:0x00007f74333976d8>
I can't think of any better representation of beauty than someone who is unafraid to be herself. #<Author:0x00007f74333971d8>
If you see something beautiful in someone, speak it! #<Author:0x00007f7433396918>
Beauty begins the moment you decide to be yourself. #<Author:0x00007f74333962d8>
The sign of a beautiful person is that they always see beauty in others. #<Author:0x00007f7433395b58>
Beauty is not in the face; beauty is a light in the heart. #<Author:0x00007f7433395518>
Life’s most persistent and urgent question is, ‘What are you doing for others?’ #<Author:0x00007f7433394d98>
Charity, like the sun, brightens every object on which it shines. #<Author:0x00007f7433394898>
Work and live to serve others, leave the world a little better than you found it. #<Author:0x00007f7433394398>
Generosity consists not the sum given, but the manner in which it is bestowed. #<Author:0x00007f7433393e98>
